{"binding_class":"G","input":"214214P","move_group":"final_psycho_crusher","move_name":"Final Psycho Crusher","notes_sc":"Shin Bison only (requires detonating Psycho Mine with Forward Taunt); cannot hit cross-up; 1st active frame only connects when Bison is cornered (usually connects on 7th active frame midscreen, making it functionally 15f startup); fullscreen anti-air and anti-projectile Super; during recovery, flies off-screen then reappears on the opposite side of opponent (does not switch sides vs. cornered opponents on HIT","punish_adv":"KD 0(+6)","raw_source_token":"m.bison_214214p"}

{"binding_class":"D","input":"214HP","move_group":"backfist_combo","move_name":"Backfist Combo","notes_sc":"Plants Psycho Mine onto opponent on 2nd hit (detonates after 300f or when another Backfist Combo, Psycho Crusher, or Devil Reverse connects); useful ender for some juggles (higher KD advantage in high-connect juggles); Potential Bug: builds more Super gauge on hit when comboed into (denoted with [] in data)","punish_adv":"KD +31","raw_source_token":"m.bison_214hp"}

{"binding_class":"D","input":"214HP","move_group":"backfist_combo_mine","move_name":"Backfist Combo (Mine)","notes_sc":"Detonates Psycho Mine on hit/block; Mine detonation does not count as a hit for damage scaling; puts opponent into limited juggle state that allows follow-up juggles (can combo into midscreen 2HK / 3HK / LP Crusher / OD Backfist / SA1 / SA3, as well as corner LP Backfist); 2nd hit triggers Mine detonation even on Perfect Parry (punishable 5f gap before explosion hits); lets Bison maintain pressure on block; can be timed to plant another Psycho Mine if the previous one detonates during this attack's hitstun; POSSIBLE BUG: builds more Super gauge when comboed into compared to raw connect","punish_adv":"KD +49","raw_source_token":"m.bison_214hp_mine"}

{"binding_class":"G","input":"-","move_group":"psycho_mine_detonation","move_name":"Psycho Mine (Detonation)","notes_sc":"Projectile hitbox (can be avoided with projectile invuln moves, including some with upper-body invuln); Mine dissipates if Bison is hit; explosion happens automatically 300f after a mine has been planted by the 2nd hit of Backfist Combo; also triggered by Psycho Crusher, Backfist Combo, and Devil Reverse on hit/block (only Backfist Combo triggers the detonation on Perfect Parry); explosion puts opponent into free juggle state or maintains existing juggle state; performing Forward Taunt causes Bison to start a countdown to trigger the explosion; explosion only counts as a hit for damage scaling when the timer expires (not when automatically activated from a special move)","punish_adv":"KD","raw_source_token":"m.bison_psycho_mine"}
